items.title: Opstelling Ajax: Gloukh begint op de bank, wel basisplaats Bounida
items.summary: De opstelling van Ajax voor het duel met FC Volendam is bekend. Trainer Fred Grim start zonder Oscar Gloukh, maar met Rayane Bounida.

items.title: Burnley v Tottenham, Man City v Wolves, Championship and more: clockwatch – live
items.summary: Join us for updates from the 3pm kick-offs Share your thoughts with Rob via email Kevin and Alex Iwobi come into the Fulham XI. Brighton bring in Olivier Boscagli, Carlos Baleba and Yasin Ayari. It’s not clear who will start at right-back for them, possibly Pascal Gross. Fulham (4-2-3-1) Leno; Castagne, Andersen, Cuenca, Robinson; Iwobi, Berge; Wilson, Smith Rowe, Kevin; Jimenez. Continue reading...

items.title: Chelsea v Arsenal: Women’s Super League – live
items.summary: Match at Stamford Bridge kicks off at 12.30pm (GMT) Share your thoughts with Emillia via email The teams are out. Everyone is wearing the correct socks. Let’s go… The stage is set. Kick-off is in just five minutes… Continue reading...

items.title: West Ham v Sunderland: Premier League – live
items.summary: Match at London Stadium kicks off at 12.30pm (GMT) Get in touch with Dom via email | Follow us on Bluesky 2 mins: No Granit Xhaka in Sunderland’s midfield could make this interesting. It does look like a straight 4-4-2, with Sadiki testing Areola early on with a sweet left-footed volley after a long throw was headed into no man’s land. Peeeeeeeeeeeeeeeeppp!! Continue reading...

items.title: Carrick: Man United ready for Arsenal 'challenge'
items.summary: Michael Carrick is prepared for a "big challenge" at table-topping Arsenal but says there is a quiet confidence around Manchester United.

items.title: Berman: Rodman deal shows new rule is working
items.summary: NWSL commissioner Jessica Berman cited Trinity Rodman's new deal as evidence that the league's new High Impact Player is working as intended: to retain and attract top players.

items.title: Sources: Arsenal exploring Álvarez summer move
items.summary: Arsenal are exploring the possibility of launching a summer move for Atletico Madrid forward Julián Álvarez, sources have told ESPN.

items.title: Infantino: Resale will drive up WC ticket prices
items.summary: FIFA president Gianni Infantino said that many fans who have applied for tickets for the 2026 World Cup will be looking to sell them for profit on resale sites, thus driving up the cost of ticket prices.

items.title: German official calls for World Cup boycott talks
items.summary: A German soccer federation executive committee member says it's time to consider a World Cup boycott because of the actions of U.S. President Donald Trump.

items.title: England request Kansas City base for World Cup
items.summary: England are set to be based at the Swope Soccer Village in Kansas City for this year's World Cup campaign, if Fifa approves their request.

items.title: VI Live: Brobbey scoort met fraaie kopbal tegen West Ham
items.summary: Zaterdag staan er weer veel fraaie potjes in binnen- en buitenland op het programma. NEC krijgt bezoek van PEC Zwolle, FC Twente speelt tegen Excelsior en in het buitenland komen onder meer Liverpool, Manchester City, Bayern München en Real Madrid in actie. Volg het voetbal in de VI Live.

items.title: Ajax-target Carlos Vicente speelt in de geest van Sjaak Swart
items.summary: Ajax zet in op de komst van Carlos Vicente (26) . Maak aan de hand van een analyse kennis met een klassieke rechtsbuiten.

items.title: Van Leer bedankte voor Go Ahead Eagles
items.summary: De winterse transfermarkt is geopend. In dit blog vind je alle speculaties en bevestigde transfers in Nederland. Bekijk hier ons blog voor de transferperikelen in het buitenland.

items.title: Reed extends Dubai lead as McIlroy's hopes fade
items.summary: Patrick Reed extended his lead to four shots ahead of the final round of the Hero Dubai Desert Classic as Viktor Hovland surged into contention on Saturday.

items.title: Bissouma handed first Spurs start of season at unchanged Burnley LIVE!
Iwobi returns for Fulham vs Brighton LIVE!
Wintertransfers Eredivisie seizoen 2025/26: alle clubs op een rij
items.summary: De transferperiode is weer losgebarsten. In dit overzicht van VI vind je alle afgeronde, door clubs bevestigde, wintertransfers van de achttien Eredivisie-clubs. Clubs in Nederland kunnen tot en met 3 februari spelers aantrekken .

items.title: Rambolek KOs Dayakaev to set up possible shot at ONE title
items.summary: Rambolek Chor Ajalaboon knocked out Abdulla Dayakaev to set up a potential clash with the Russian's team-mate, ONE bantamweight muay thai world champion Nabil Anane.

items.title: 'I was lucky' - Djokovic avoids disqualification in 400th Grand Slam win
items.summary: A frustrated Novak Djokovic avoided disqualification as he beat error-prone Dutchman Botic van de Zandschulp 6-3 6-4 7-6 (7-4) to reach the fourth round, as the 38-year-old continued his quest for ‌a record 25th Grand Slam title.

items.title: Howe looks to teenage talent Miley for Newcastle’s critical duel with Aston Villa
items.summary: If Bruno Guimarães is out, the 19-year-old should get his chance in midfield for game that could decide Champions League spot For Eddie Howe, the darkest hour really did come before the dawn. It was early November 2021 and the then unemployed manager headed to bed one Tuesday night reeling from a late phone call informing him that he had not, after all, landed a new job at Newcastle United. If the disappointment was crushing, a subsequent call early the following morning would, in Howe’s words, prove “life-changing”. The news that Unai Emery had changed his mind, withdrawn a verbal agreement to succeed Steve Bruce at St James’ Park and decided to stay at Villarreal instead was followed by a question: might Howe still be interested in swapping the south coast for Tyneside? Continue reading...
